title: True Survival
description: A modpack that makes survival realistic.
body:
# True Survival
True Survival is a modpack that aims to make Minecraft survival as close to real life as possible. This also makes survival a lot harder.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Mfw0H0BjqSs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features
- More animals and animal types
- Ambient sounds and realistic sound physics
- Temperature
- Advanced trees
- More plants and foods
- Realistic health system
- Realistic village(r)s
- Realistic early game progression
- Realistic physics
- Seasons
- Realistic sleep
- Thirst
- Realistic weather
- A lot of other small things

## Notes
There are 2 shader options: one for the best quality and one for the best performance. Press O on your keyboard to change the shader.

## FAQ
No one actually asked me any of this, but i thought it would be a good idea to put it here anyways :)
### How do i get started in a new world?
I'm too lazy to make a whole guide, but you can use [this mod wiki](https://github.com/alcatrazEscapee/no-tree-punching/wiki) to get started and the JEI (Just Enough Items) in-game menu to view crafting recipes.
### Help my pc is burning
Press O, and use the Performance shader or turn the shader off completely.
### 1.21 when?
True Survival 2 is currently in development and will be based on 1.21.1. True Survival 2 will feature a different set of (more modern) mods and will not be compatible with the current version of True Survival.
